title: Cobblemon - Syn. Eevees
description: Syn. Eevees Fakemon for the Cobblemon Mod
body:
# Syn. Eevees
_Welcome to the Synthetic Eevee Project. The Syn. Eevee model was originally made for an attempt to research natural behavor of pokemon outside of human interaction, however after some failures and one miracle, the model has been repurposed as a tool to help Eevees who's life has been cut short due to many reasons, providing a synthetic body for Eevees in need._

Synthetic Eevees is a project that came from just a simple idea, but grew to become a project. This is a depiction of how Robotic Eevees would look and the lore behind them, you might say this looks like future paradox forms and... yea it sure seems so.

## Features
This Addon adds Synthetic Eevee and its 8 Eeveelutions. To obtain the Syn. Eevee, use metal coating on an Eevee, the Eeveelutions can be obtained by evolving the Syn. Eevee with evolution stones or friendship like usual.

## Future Features
- Proper Animations for the Eevees
- Touchups to the models
- Maybe: Adjusted Combat Stats to make them unique (currently same as normal eevee)

![Synthetic Eevee on a cliff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e7020fbf6a1a4e6c518d4af71ca697656e66f93.png)
